title: Busbar module and method of manufacturing the same
abstract: A busbar module includes: a busbar including an upper plate and a lower plate overlapping with the upper plate; an electrode lead positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate; and a connecting part disposed between the upper plate and the electrode lead to electrically connect the upper plate and the electrode lead, wherein a through hole is formed in the lower plate, and the connecting part is disposed at a position corresponding to the through hole.
claims: 1. A busbar module comprising: a busbar including an upper plate and a lower plate overlapping with the upper plate; an electrode lead positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate; and a connecting part disposed between the upper plate and the electrode lead to electrically connect the upper plate and the electrode lead, wherein a through hole is formed in the lower plate, and wherein the connecting part is at least partially received in the through hole.
